entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, the host plant affected by PSMD and PoLV-PP

entities.name: PIGEONPEA STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A disease of pigeonpea transmitted by eriophyid mites

entities.name: ERIOPHYID MITES
entities.description: Vectors responsible for transmitting pigeonpea sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: POTHOS LATENT VIRUS PIGEONPEA ISOLATE
entities.description: A virus isolate (PoLV-PP) found in pigeonpea plants, identified as an isolate of Pothos latent virus

entities.name: POTHOS LATENT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus in the genus Aureusvirus and family Tombusviridae

entities.name: AUREUSVIRUS
entities.description: The genus to which Pothos latent virus belongs

entities.name: TOMBUSVIRIDAE
entities.description: The family to which the genus Aureusvirus belongs

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where PSMD-affected and asymptomatic pigeonpea plants were studied

entities.name: MECHANICAL INOCULATION
entities.description: A technique used to transmit the virus to herbaceous species and pigeonpea

entities.name: SOIL TRANSMISSION
entities.description: A technique used to transmit the virus experimentally to herbaceous test plants

entities.name: GEL DOUBLE-DIFFUSION SEROLOGICAL TESTS
entities.description: A test used to compare the isolated virus with Pothos latent virus

entities.name: ENZYME-LINKED IMMUNOSORBENT ASSAY
entities.description: A method used to detect PoLV-PP in pigeonpea plants

entities.name: REVERSE-TRANSCRIPTASE POLYMERASE CHAIN REACTION
entities.description: A method used to detect PoLV-PP in pigeonpea plants

entities.name: NECROSIS
entities.description: Localized leaf death induced by the virus in healthy pigeonpea plants
